items.title: Vector space
items.author: Wikipedia contributors
items.note: Concise reference for formal definitions of vector spaces, subspaces, bases and dimension with examples.

items.title: Gilbert Strang, Linear Algebra and Learning from Data
items.author: Gilbert Strang
items.note: Applied linear algebra text that introduces vectors, subspaces, bases and dimension with many data-focused examples.

items.title: MIT OpenCourseWare 18.06 Linear Algebra
items.author: MIT OpenCourseWare
items.note: Free course materials covering vectors, vector spaces, subspaces and their role in applied problems.

items.title: 3Blue1Brown, Essence of Linear Algebra (chapters on vectors and spaces)
items.author: Grant Sanderson
items.note: Visual series that builds geometric intuition for vectors, linear combinations, span, subspaces and basis.
